name: NewsNow MCP Server
what_it_does: NewsNow MCP server enabling AI agents to access aggregated news from multiple sources — fetching headlines, articles, and trending topics from news feeds and aggregators, filtering by category or keyword, and integrating current news data into agent-driven research, monitoring, and content creation workflows.
use_cases: Fetching current news headlines for research from information gathering agents
Monitoring news for brand mentions or topic tracking from monitoring agents
Gathering news content for summarization from content curation agents
Finding trending topics for content creation from marketing agents
Research assistance with current events from knowledge agents
News-based context enrichment for analysis from business intelligence agents
not_for: Full article text retrieval (may be limited by publisher paywalls)
High-frequency real-time monitoring (use dedicated news APIs for streaming)
Academic or financial news requiring premium sources
best_when: An agent needs to access current news headlines and summaries from multiple sources — for research, monitoring, or context enrichment with recent events.
avoid_when: You need premium news sources, full article text, or real-time streaming news — use paid news APIs (NewsAPI, Bloomberg, Reuters) instead.

auth.notes: No authentication required — fetches from public news aggregators and RSS feeds. Some premium news sources may require API keys if configured.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free for public news sources
pricing.notes: Free and open source. Accesses public news feeds — no API costs for basic usage.

performance.rate_limits: News source dependent — excessive requests may be rate-limited by news sites

known_agent_gotchas: News aggregator sources may change or go offline — reliability depends on upstream sources
Full article text may be truncated or unavailable due to publisher paywalls
News freshness varies by source — some feeds may be delayed by hours
Community MCP from individual contributor — limited ongoing maintenance
Excessive requests to news sites may result in IP blocking — implement rate limiting
Content may be in multiple languages depending on configured sources
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTP/HTTPS GET to news sources. No credentials required for basic usage. Public data only. No user data stored. Safe for general use.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public news feeds. No credentials. HTTPS for most sources. Safe community MCP.
